    base:desc "Sensing component for physical system measurements"

    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhysicalSystemMeasurementSensor

    DTDFVocab:inputTo CppProgrammingLanguageEnabler, JavaProgrammingLanguageEnabler

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system adheres to industry standards including SysML for model-based systems engineering, ACME, AADL, and MontiArc as architecture description languages (ADLs) to model components, interfaces, interconnections, and composition across multiple abstraction levels (requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, and product/technical layer), ensuring interoperability and structured system description."
